name: architecture-diagram
description: Evaluations for architecture-diagram skill trigger accuracy

evals.name: trigger-positive
evals.description: Skill should trigger on architecture diagram and visualization requests

prompts.input: Create an architecture diagram for my microservices system
Draw a system architecture showing React frontend, Node.js API, and PostgreSQL
Visualize our AWS infrastructure with CloudFront, Lambda, and DynamoDB
I need a network topology diagram for our Kubernetes cluster
帮我画一个微服务架构图
Generate a security diagram showing authentication and authorization flow
prompts.reason: Security diagram matches skill trigger words

evals.name: trigger-negative
evals.description: Skill should NOT trigger on unrelated requests

prompts.input: Fix the bug in my login function
Write unit tests for this module
Refactor this function to be more readable
